hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.file_path"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(node_modules|dist|build|\.next|__pycache__|\.venv|vendor|\.git)/|\.(lock|svg|png|jpg|jpeg|gif|ico|woff|woff2|ttf|eot)$"; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|py|go)$"; then echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"AI Dev OS: Ensure this change complies with the project guidelines. Check CLAUDE.md for the applicable rules.\"}"; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "^git commit"; then echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"Please run a guideline check before committing: /ai-dev-os-check\"}"; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.file_path"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "ai-dev-os/01_philosophy/"; then echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"⚠️ L1 philosophy was modified. Dependency rule: Do not include tool-specific terms (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) in L1.\"}" ; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "ai-dev-os/02_(principles|decision-criteria)/"; then echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"⚠️ L2 principles were modified. Dependency rule: Do not include framework-specific implementation details in L2.\"}" ; fi'
hooks.statusMessage: AI Dev OS: Layer dependency check...

hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".prompt"); if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qiE "(rule|guideline|ガイドライン).*(add|change|delete|modify|追加|変更|削除|修正)"; then echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"AI Dev OS guideline change detected. Use /ai-dev-os-extract to extract rules via the reverse-engineering method.\"}"; elif echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qiE "(implement|create|add|build|develop|refactor|fix|実装|作成|追加|構築|開発|リファクタ|修正).*(feature|function|module|component|endpoint|api|service|page|機能|関数|モジュール|コンポーネント|エンドポイント|サービス|ページ)"; then echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"💡 For guideline-aware implementation, consider using /ai-dev-os-plan to create a plan with compliance checklists before coding.\"}"; fi'
